name: Recount the Recount
subtitle: Certified by the Whateverville Board of Maybe
text:
Each player votes for a target creature. The loudest player's vote counts twice; the quietest player's vote counts as half a vote.
Recount the Recount deals 2.5 damage, rounded emotionally, to the creature with the most votes. If two creatures tie, deal the damage to both as a single creature, simultaneously.
Then recount. There is no end to this step, but please stop after a while.
flavorText: "Mayor Gnasher won by a margin of one and a half goblins."

extras.impossibleMath: 2.5 damage rounded emotionally; half-votes; runaway recount loop
